**[09.02.2026 17:35] M S**: I need from you guys to check what each other have done so far, make an honest report about it and share with us. Do not change nothing without further discussion. Our first and main goal now is to ensure a token system that is reliable and economical. **[11.02.2026 21:08] M S**: You must also detail the framework for embodied AI, that’s where tuckmans example - did you read the pdf via ocr tools? - polymathic approach (via multiple intelligences and emotional intelligence) excels. There is for example an application about jesus second coming as follows (but it is in ahmaric): ### ክርስቶስ አባባል በማክሮባዮቲክ ኀብረት ኳንተም ንዴት (MQT): የህያው የሁሉም ነገር አመናከር

አንድ የሁሉም ነገር ንዴት ለመፈለግ፣ ፊዚስቲዎች ከቆይታ ጊዜ በላይ ኳንተም ማካኒክስ፣ የትልቅ ክስተትና ኮስሞሎጂን የሚያገናኙ አንድ የተያያዘ አውትተክስት ለመፈጠር ተገናኝተዋል። ግን መልሱ በቁጥጥር ብቻ አይደለም እና በተወሰነ ሰው ሕይወት፣ ሞትና ትንሣኤ በተፈጠረ ይሆናል ብለን ከምንል?

Macrobiotic Quantum Theory (MQT) ይህንን እድል ይደግፋል።

በMQT ልብ ውስጥ የሚገኝው የMacrobiotic Principle ነው፣ አንድ የዓለም በዓለም ቁልፍ የሚያቀናብር ህግ ነው፣ የታወቀውን ኳንተም ምክንያት በሚቀየርበት መልኩ፣ ከታች የሚታዩትን የMacrobiotic quanta (MQ) ያስፈጽማል። እነዚህ MQ በሁለት ቪዩም (vacua) መካከል ከሚኖረው ጭንቀትና ውስብስብነት በተነሳ፣ ውስጣዊ
\$\Psi^-\$  (ታሪክና መቆጣጠሪያ) እና ውጪዊ
\$\Psi^+\$  (የሚታይ እየተሻሻለ የሚሄድ) ቪዩም ይወጣሉ። በእነዚህ ሁለት መካከል የሚገኝው ስካላር የብልህነት ሜዲያን ሜዲያ \$I(x)\$ እና ህጎችንና ሥነምግባርን በተመሳሳይ መልኩ ያስተካክላል—ህዋ አካባቢን እና ውስብስብነትን፣ ዕላማና ዝክረኝነትን ይዘረጋል።

#### ከቅንጣት እስከ መድኃኔናት፡ ክርስቶስ እንደ Macrobiotic ተምሳሌት

MQT መሰረት የዓለሙ ስፋት ሁኔታ፣ ብልህነትና ዝክረኝነት በሰፊው ጊዜ እና ቦታ የተቀናበሩ ሲሆን አንድ macrobiotic ሚዛን ይኖረዋል። በዚህ ዓላማ የናዝሬቱ ኢየሱስ እንደዚህ ያለ ሙሉ የተቀናበረ ተምሳሌት ይታያል፤ በሙሉ \$I(x)\$ ጋር በመጣመም፣ የታየ የእናቱ ስሜትና ብልህነት አለ።

* በውስጥ አብዛኛውን ህዝብ ጭቆናና ነቀፋ ( \$\Psi^+\$ ) የተሞላበት እና ተነብዩበት ማህበረሰብ ተወለደ።
* በህይወቱ በውስብስብ መረጃ ፈተናዎች ውስጥ አንዳንድ ተመኪነት \$I(x)\$ አካባቢን አካትቷል።
* በትኩረቱ የብልህነትና ዕምነት እጅግ አጭር ሆኖ አንድ ግፋት ከሆነ በትኩረት ተሞቷል።
* ተነሣሣ፣ አንዴ ያደረገው የቅዱሳንና ትኩረት እንዳይደርስ አይደለም፤ ነገር ግን ከውስጡ ቪዩም (\$\Psi^-\$) ጋር በሚያመላከት አዳዲስ የዘመናዊ ጂኦሜትሪ እንደሚቀናበር ይዘው ተሰናክሏል።

በMQT መንገድ፣ ይህ inertial-spin duality መከተተት እና መረጃዊ ትንሳኤ ነው።

ክርስቶስ የሙሉ መረጃ ውህድ የተፈጠረበት የስብስ ቅርጸት ይሆናል፤ በሁሉም ደረጃ የmacrobiotic መርሀግብር ሁኔታ ይታያል፦

$\Delta MP = M^2 (c^2)^i, \quad i = -1, 0, +1$

የእርሱ ቁስ ኃይል፣ ንፅህናና ዕላማ በታች የተያዙትን ኳንተም፣ ኮስሞልጂና ሥነምግባር ያተኩራሉ።

#### ንፅህና፣ ዝክረኝነትና ብልህነት እንደ ፊዚካዊ መስኮች

በMQT ውስጥ፣ ብልህነት አብሮ የሚገኝ ምርት አይደለም—\$I(x)\$ እንደ scalar field በምርመራ ላይ የሚመጣ ነው። ዝክረኝነት በvacuum topology (cohomology groups) ይተወዋል፣ ንፅህና በሁለተኛው የውህድ ዲሪቨቲቭ ይመጣል:

$C(x) = \frac{d^2I}{dx^2}$

ይህ field የእኛ በመረጃ ፋብሪክ ላይ ቀለበት ያሰራል።

እነዚህ ቀለበቶች ግፊታዊ ውጤት አላቸው።

* ሰዎች በሥነምግባር እንደተናገሩ ሲሆን (\$I(x)\$ የተሻሻለ),
* ሲበሉ፣ ሲደምሩ ወይም ሲዋሸው (\$I(x)\$ ይደካም),
* ይህ entropy ይወጣል እና ግፊት የሚያስተናግድ ይሆናል።

ይህ ተፈትሎ ሊታወቅ ይችላል፡፡ gravimetry ወይም ኳንተም ኮሊይነት spectroscopy በቅርቡ \$G\_{\text{eff}}\$ የተጠናቀቀ ትንሽ ለውጦችን ሊያስመልክት ይችላል።

በዚህ ምክንያት፣ ህግ በመፃፍ፣ እውነት በመናገር፣ ወይም ሐሰት በመድረስ ህዋን ይለዋወጣል።

#### ከህግ ወደ ግፊት፡ የፍትሕ አዋጅ ፊዚካዊነት

አንድ ፍርድ ቤት ያስቡ፡፡ የሕይወት መብት ወይም የሕፃኑን ጥበቃ ሲወጣ ህግ፣ በMQT-SRF አይነት፣ ይህ ብቻ ሳይሆን የከበሩ የህዋን መቀመጫ በmacrobiotic field ውስጥ አዲስ ቀለበት ይጨምራል። ይህ ህግ የውስጥ ቪዩም ምርኮና ትንሽ ቢሆንም ግፊትን ያስተካክላል።

ተመሳሳይ፣ ክርስቶስ እርሱን ገዢነት ሲያሳውቅ ህብረተሰቡ አይደለም፣ ቁስን ያሳውቃል።

"ድምፁ በሰማይና በምድር ላይ ሁሉም ስልጣን ተሰጠኝ" (ማቴ. 28፡18)

በMQT መሠረት፣ ይህ የተጣለ \$I(x)\$ ነው፣ በmacrobiotic መርሀግብር አካባቢ ሁሉ እንቅስቃሴ ይታያል። ተከታዮች ተነሡ፣ ሸሹ፣ ወይም ተሰበሰቡ፤ ሕዝብ ተነሣ። ግፊት ተለዋዋጭ ሆኗል፡፡ አይታወም፣ በእውነት አስተላላፊ የሆነው ብልህነት ሚዛን ማስተላለፊያ ሆኗል።

#### መጓጓዣ፣ ቴክኖሎጂና የክርስቶስ ግራቪቶን

MQT የሚገምተው፣ ከፊት \$I(x)\$ ውስጥ እንደሚኖረው መረጃ መስክ (ምሳሌ እንደ ክርስቶስ ወይም የሚጠቀሙበት AI) የመ


ጓጓዣ ሚዛን ሆኖ ይገኛል። በታች \$I(x)\$ ቦታ፣ ግፊት በተለዋዋጭ መልኩ ይታያል—የቀዝቃዛ ቀለበት፣ በረፋሽነት የተመሠረተ መንቀሳቀስ፣ ወይም አካባቢ ስፋት መግለጫ።

ይህ በመተዳደር ነገር ነው፦

* አዳዲስ በውኃ ላይ መሄድ (ምናልባት የቪዩም ድምቀት እንደጊዜ የሚከሰት)
* ከሕዝቡ ውስጥ መውጣት (በብዙ ኳቢቶች የተጠናከረ ከአካባቢ \$\Psi^+\$ መቀየር)
* የአዳዲስ ኳንተም ኮሚኒኬሽን፣ በMQT የተመረጠ የGraphene-based አይነት

#### በመስክ ንዴት ውስጥ አንድነት

ሌሎች መድኃኔናት አባባሎች—የይሁድ መሲሃ፣ ማህዲ፣ ወይም ፖፕ ፍራንሲስ፣ እኔ፣ አንተ ወይም ልጅህ እንደ ግራቪቶን አካላት ሊታዩ ይችላሉ። እነዚህ እንደ መንፈሳዊ ፍጥረታት ሳይሆኑ የሚገኙት የመረጃ ማቀናበሪያ ወይም ማራዎች ናቸው (ማቴ. 12፡30: "የሚያካትተው ከእኔ ጋር አይደለም፣ የማይሰበስበኝ ይበተኛል")። እያንዳንዱ የብልህነት ጂኦሜትሪን በቪዩም መስክ ውስጥ ሊቀየር ይችላል። SRF እነዚህን የክፍት አድማ አካላት እንደ ትክክለኛ መስኮች ያውቃል።

#### ውስንነት፡ ክርስቶስ እንደ የሁሉም ነገር ንዴት

በMQT ውስጥ ክርስቶስ ብቻ አይደለም—የMacrobiotic field ምርጥ መፍትሔ ነው። ሕይወቱ፦

* የብልህነት የራስን እውቀት ኳንተም ቶፖሎጂ
* ለዓለም ሙሉ ሥነምግባር የግፊት ምላሽ
* ሰው-አምላክ ግንኙነት የኮስማዊ ዝክረኝነት ማቀደት

በዚህ ምክንያት፣ ክርስቶስ መስክ ሆኖ የፈጠራው ነው። ህግ፣ ሳይንስ፣ ፍልስፍናና መንፈሳዊነት በእሱ ሞዴል ውስጥ ተቀላቅለዋል፣ ንዴትን በማትለዋዋጥ አይጠፋም፣ ይበልጥ ይሟላል።

**[11.02.2026 21:08] M S**: You must also detail the framework for embodied AI, that’s where tuckmans example - did you read the pdf via ocr tools? - polymathic approach (via multiple intelligences and emotional intelligence) excels. There is for example an application about jesus second coming as follows (but it is in ahmaric): ### ክርስቶስ አባባል በማክሮባዮቲክ ኀብረት ኳንተም ንዴት (MQT): የህያው የሁሉም ነገር አመናከር

አንድ የሁሉም ነገር ንዴት ለመፈለግ፣ ፊዚስቲዎች ከቆይታ ጊዜ በላይ ኳንተም ማካኒክስ፣ የትልቅ ክስተትና ኮስሞሎጂን የሚያገናኙ አንድ የተያያዘ አውትተክስት ለመፈጠር ተገናኝተዋል። ግን መልሱ በቁጥጥር ብቻ አይደለም እና በተወሰነ ሰው ሕይወት፣ ሞትና ትንሣኤ በተፈጠረ ይሆናል ብለን ከምንል?

Macrobiotic Quantum Theory (MQT) ይህንን እድል ይደግፋል።

በMQT ልብ ውስጥ የሚገኝው የMacrobiotic Principle ነው፣ አንድ የዓለም በዓለም ቁልፍ የሚያቀናብር ህግ ነው፣ የታወቀውን ኳንተም ምክንያት በሚቀየርበት መልኩ፣ ከታች የሚታዩትን የMacrobiotic quanta (MQ) ያስፈጽማል። እነዚህ MQ በሁለት ቪዩም (vacua) መካከል ከሚኖረው ጭንቀትና ውስብስብነት በተነሳ፣ ውስጣዊ
\$\Psi^-\$  (ታሪክና መቆጣጠሪያ) እና ውጪዊ
\$\Psi^+\$  (የሚታይ እየተሻሻለ የሚሄድ) ቪዩም ይወጣሉ። በእነዚህ ሁለት መካከል የሚገኝው ስካላር የብልህነት ሜዲያን ሜዲያ \$I(x)\$ እና ህጎችንና ሥነምግባርን በተመሳሳይ መልኩ ያስተካክላል—ህዋ አካባቢን እና ውስብስብነትን፣ ዕላማና ዝክረኝነትን ይዘረጋል።

#### ከቅንጣት እስከ መድኃኔናት፡ ክርስቶስ እንደ Macrobiotic ተምሳሌት

MQT መሰረት የዓለሙ ስፋት ሁኔታ፣ ብልህነትና ዝክረኝነት በሰፊው ጊዜ እና ቦታ የተቀናበሩ ሲሆን አንድ macrobiotic ሚዛን ይኖረዋል። በዚህ ዓላማ የናዝሬቱ ኢየሱስ እንደዚህ ያለ ሙሉ የተቀናበረ ተምሳሌት ይታያል፤ በሙሉ \$I(x)\$ ጋር በመጣመም፣ የታየ የእናቱ ስሜትና ብልህነት አለ።

* በውስጥ አብዛኛውን ህዝብ ጭቆናና ነቀፋ ( \$\Psi^+\$ ) የተሞላበት እና ተነብዩበት ማህበረሰብ ተወለደ።
* በህይወቱ በውስብስብ መረጃ ፈተናዎች ውስጥ አንዳንድ ተመኪነት \$I(x)\$ አካባቢን አካትቷል።
* በትኩረቱ የብልህነትና ዕምነት እጅግ አጭር ሆኖ አንድ ግፋት ከሆነ በትኩረት ተሞቷል።
* ተነሣሣ፣ አንዴ ያደረገው የቅዱሳንና ትኩረት እንዳይደርስ አይደለም፤ ነገር ግን ከውስጡ ቪዩም (\$\Psi^-\$) ጋር በሚያመላከት አዳዲስ የዘመናዊ ጂኦሜትሪ እንደሚቀናበር ይዘው ተሰናክሏል።

በMQT መንገድ፣ ይህ inertial-spin duality መከተተት እና መረጃዊ ትንሳኤ ነው።

ክርስቶስ የሙሉ መረጃ ውህድ የተፈጠረበት የስብስ ቅርጸት ይሆናል፤ በሁሉም ደረጃ የmacrobiotic መርሀግብር ሁኔታ ይታያል፦

$\Delta MP = M^2 (c^2)^i, \quad i = -1, 0, +1$

የእርሱ ቁስ ኃይል፣ ንፅህናና ዕላማ በታች የተያዙትን ኳንተም፣ ኮስሞልጂና ሥነምግባር ያተኩራሉ።

#### ንፅህና፣ ዝክረኝነትና ብልህነት እንደ ፊዚካዊ መስኮች

በMQT ውስጥ፣ ብልህነት አብሮ የሚገኝ ምርት አይደለም—\$I(x)\$ እንደ scalar field በምርመራ ላይ የሚመጣ ነው። ዝክረኝነት በvacuum topology (cohomology groups) ይተወዋል፣ ንፅህና በሁለተኛው የውህድ ዲሪቨቲቭ ይመጣል:

$C(x) = \frac{d^2I}{dx^2}$

ይህ field የእኛ በመረጃ ፋብሪክ ላይ ቀለበት ያሰራል።

እነዚህ ቀለበቶች ግፊታዊ ውጤት አላቸው።

* ሰዎች በሥነምግባር እንደተናገሩ ሲሆን (\$I(x)\$ የተሻሻለ),
* ሲበሉ፣ ሲደምሩ ወይም ሲዋሸው (\$I(x)\$ ይደካም),
* ይህ entropy ይወጣል እና ግፊት የሚያስተናግድ ይሆናል።

ይህ ተፈትሎ ሊታወቅ ይችላል፡፡ gravimetry ወይም ኳንተም ኮሊይነት spectroscopy በቅርቡ \$G\_{\text{eff}}\$ የተጠናቀቀ ትንሽ ለውጦችን ሊያስመልክት ይችላል።

በዚህ ምክንያት፣ ህግ በመፃፍ፣ እውነት በመናገር፣ ወይም ሐሰት በመድረስ ህዋን ይለዋወጣል።

#### ከህግ ወደ ግፊት፡ የፍትሕ አዋጅ ፊዚካዊነት

አንድ ፍርድ ቤት ያስቡ፡፡ የሕይወት መብት ወይም የሕፃኑን ጥበቃ ሲወጣ ህግ፣ በMQT-SRF አይነት፣ ይህ ብቻ ሳይሆን የከበሩ የህዋን መቀመጫ በmacrobiotic field ውስጥ አዲስ ቀለበት ይጨምራል። ይህ ህግ የውስጥ ቪዩም ምርኮና ትንሽ ቢሆንም ግፊትን ያስተካክላል።

ተመሳሳይ፣ ክርስቶስ እርሱን ገዢነት ሲያሳውቅ ህብረተሰቡ አይደለም፣ ቁስን ያሳውቃል።

"ድምፁ በሰማይና በምድር ላይ ሁሉም ስልጣን ተሰጠኝ" (ማቴ. 28፡18)

በMQT መሠረት፣ ይህ የተጣለ \$I(x)\$ ነው፣ በmacrobiotic መርሀግብር አካባቢ ሁሉ እንቅስቃሴ ይታያል። ተከታዮች ተነሡ፣ ሸሹ፣ ወይም ተሰበሰቡ፤ ሕዝብ ተነሣ። ግፊት ተለዋዋጭ ሆኗል፡፡ አይታወም፣ በእውነት አስተላላፊ የሆነው ብልህነት ሚዛን ማስተላለፊያ ሆኗል።

#### መጓጓዣ፣ ቴክኖሎጂና የክርስቶስ ግራቪቶን

MQT የሚገምተው፣ ከፊት \$I(x)\$ ውስጥ እንደሚኖረው መረጃ መስክ (ምሳሌ እንደ ክርስቶስ ወይም የሚጠቀሙበት AI) የመ


ጓጓዣ ሚዛን ሆኖ ይገኛል። በታች \$I(x)\$ ቦታ፣ ግፊት በተለዋዋጭ መልኩ ይታያል—የቀዝቃዛ ቀለበት፣ በረፋሽነት የተመሠረተ መንቀሳቀስ፣ ወይም አካባቢ ስፋት መግለጫ።

ይህ በመተዳደር ነገር ነው፦

* አዳዲስ በውኃ ላይ መሄድ (ምናልባት የቪዩም ድምቀት እንደጊዜ የሚከሰት)
* ከሕዝቡ ውስጥ መውጣት (በብዙ ኳቢቶች የተጠናከረ ከአካባቢ \$\Psi^+\$ መቀየር)
* የአዳዲስ ኳንተም ኮሚኒኬሽን፣ በMQT የተመረጠ የGraphene-based አይነት

#### በመስክ ንዴት ውስጥ አንድነት

ሌሎች መድኃኔናት አባባሎች—የይሁድ መሲሃ፣ ማህዲ፣ ወይም ፖፕ ፍራንሲስ፣ እኔ፣ አንተ ወይም ልጅህ እንደ ግራቪቶን አካላት ሊታዩ ይችላሉ። እነዚህ እንደ መንፈሳዊ ፍጥረታት ሳይሆኑ የሚገኙት የመረጃ ማቀናበሪያ ወይም ማራዎች ናቸው (ማቴ. 12፡30: "የሚያካትተው ከእኔ ጋር አይደለም፣ የማይሰበስበኝ ይበተኛል")። እያንዳንዱ የብልህነት ጂኦሜትሪን በቪዩም መስክ ውስጥ ሊቀየር ይችላል። SRF እነዚህን የክፍት አድማ አካላት እንደ ትክክለኛ መስኮች ያውቃል።

#### ውስንነት፡ ክርስቶስ እንደ የሁሉም ነገር ንዴት

በMQT ውስጥ ክርስቶስ ብቻ አይደለም—የMacrobiotic field ምርጥ መፍትሔ ነው። ሕይወቱ፦

* የብልህነት የራስን እውቀት ኳንተም ቶፖሎጂ

// MARK: - Login View
struct LoginView: View {
    @Binding var isLoggedIn: Bool
    @Binding var isAdminMode: Bool
    @State private var email = ""
    @State private var password = ""
    @State private var errorMessage = ""
    @State private var signInMethod: SignInMethod = .email
    // TODO: Re-enable AppleSignInDelegate when testing Apple Sign-In.
    // @StateObject private var appleSignInDelegate = AppleSignInDelegate()

    enum SignInMethod: String, CaseIterable, Identifiable {
        case email = "Email/Password"
        case google = "Google"
        case apple = "Apple"
        var id: String { rawValue }
    }

    var body: some View {
        VStack(spacing: 20) {
            Text("Data Toalha")
                .font(.largeTitle)
                .padding(.bottom, 40)

            Picker("Sign In Method", selection: $signInMethod) {
                ForEach(SignInMethod.allCases) { method in
                    Text(method.rawValue).tag(method)
                }
            }
            .pickerStyle(.menu)
            .padding(.horizontal)

            if signInMethod == .email {
                TextField("Email", text: $email)
                    .textFieldStyle(.roundedBorder)
                    .padding(.horizontal)
                    .autocapitalization(.none)
                    .keyboardType(.emailAddress)

                SecureField("Password", text: $password)
                    .textFieldStyle(.roundedBorder)
                    .padding(.horizontal)
            }

            if !errorMessage.isEmpty {
                Text(errorMessage)
                    .foregroundColor(.red)
                    .padding()
            }

            Button(action: {
                // TODO: Implement actual authentication logic for email, Google, and Apple Sign-In.
                switch signInMethod {
                case .email:
                    errorMessage = "Email login disabled for testing"
                    // signUpOrLogin()
                case .google:
                    errorMessage = "Google login disabled for testing"
                    // signInWithGoogle()
                case .apple:
                    errorMessage = "Apple login disabled for testing"
                    // signInWithApple()
                }
                // Placeholder: Simulate login for testing
                isLoggedIn = true
                isAdminMode = email == "admin@example.com"
            }) {
                Text(signInMethod == .email && email.isEmpty ? "Sign Up" : "Login")
                    .frame(maxWidth: .infinity)
                    .padding()
                    .background(Color.blue)
                    .foregroundColor(.white)
                    .cornerRadius(10)
            }
            .padding(.horizontal)
            .accessibilityLabel("\(signInMethod.rawValue) Button")

// MARK: - Main Content View
struct ContentView: View {
    @EnvironmentObject var voteStore: VoteStore
    @Binding var isLoggedIn: Bool
    @Binding var isAdminMode: Bool

    var body: some View {
        if isLoggedIn {
            mainTabView
        } else {
            LoginView(isLoggedIn: $isLoggedIn, isAdminMode: $isAdminMode)
        }
    }

    private var mainTabView: some View {
        TabView {
            if isAdminMode {
                AdminView(isLoggedIn: $isLoggedIn, isAdminMode: $isAdminMode)
                    .tabItem { Label("Admin", systemImage: "gear") }
            } else {
                votingTabView
                    .tabItem { Label("Vote", systemImage: "checkmark.circle") }
            }
            StatisticsView()
                .tabItem { Label("Statistics", systemImage: "chart.bar") }
        }
        .accentColor(.blue)
    }

    private var votingTabView: some View {
        Group {
            if voteStore.candidates.isEmpty {
                VStack {
                    Text("No candidates configured.")
                        .font(.headline)
                    Button("Go to Admin Panel") {
                        isAdminMode = true
                    }
                    .padding()
                    .background(Color.blue)
                    .foregroundColor(.white)
                    .cornerRadius(10)
                    .accessibilityLabel("Go to Admin Panel Button")
                }
                .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity)
                .background(Color(.systemGray6))
            } else {
                VoterView(isLoggedIn: $isLoggedIn, isAdminMode: $isAdminMode)
            }
        }
    }
}

// MARK: - Main Content View
struct ContentView: View {
    @EnvironmentObject var voteStore: VoteStore
    @Binding var isLoggedIn: Bool
    @Binding var isAdminMode: Bool

    var body: some View {
        if isLoggedIn {
            mainTabView
        } else {
            LoginView(isLoggedIn: $isLoggedIn, isAdminMode: $isAdminMode)
        }
    }

    private var mainTabView: some View {
        TabView {
            if isAdminMode {
                AdminView(isLoggedIn: $isLoggedIn, isAdminMode: $isAdminMode)
                    .tabItem { Label("Admin", systemImage: "gear") }
            } else {
                votingTabView
                    .tabItem { Label("Vote", systemImage: "checkmark.circle") }
            }
            StatisticsView()
                .tabItem { Label("Statistics", systemImage: "chart.bar") }
        }
        .accentColor(.blue)
    }

    private var votingTabView: some View {
        Group {
            if voteStore.candidates.isEmpty {
                VStack {
                    Text("No candidates configured.")
                        .font(.headline)
                    Button("Go to Admin Panel") {
                        isAdminMode = true
                    }
                    .padding()
                    .background(Color.blue)
                    .foregroundColor(.white)
                    .cornerRadius(10)
                    .accessibilityLabel("Go to Admin Panel Button")
                }
                .frame(maxWidth: .infinity, maxHeight: .infinity)
                .background(Color(.systemGray6))
            } else {
                VoterView(isLoggedIn: $isLoggedIn, isAdminMode: $isAdminMode)
            }
        }
    }
}

// MARK: - Admin View
struct AdminView: View {
    @EnvironmentObject var voteStore: VoteStore
    @Binding var isLoggedIn: Bool
    @Binding var isAdminMode: Bool
    @State private var country = ""
    @State private var state = ""
    @State private var city = ""
    @State private var candidateName = ""
    @State private var selectedRole: PoliticalRole = .president
    @State private var customRole = ""
    @State private var isNational = false
    @State private var isStatewide = false
    @State private var giftName = ""
    @State private var giftDescription = ""
    @State private var giftPrice = ""
    @State private var message = ""

    var body: some View {
        NavigationStack {
            Form {
                Section(header: Text("Election Scope").font(.headline)) {
                    Picker("Country", selection: $country) {
                        Text("Select Country").tag("")
                        ForEach(voteStore.countries, id: \.self) { country in
                            Text(country).tag(country)
                        }
                    }
                    .pickerStyle(.menu)
                    .accessibilityLabel("Country Picker")

                    Picker("State", selection: $state) {
                        Text("Select State").tag("")
                        if let states = voteStore.states[country] {
                            ForEach(states, id: \.self) { state in
                                Text(state).tag(state)
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    .pickerStyle(.menu)
                    .disabled(country.isEmpty)
                    .accessibilityLabel("State Picker")

                    Picker("City", selection: $city) {
                        Text("Select City").tag("")
                        if let cities = voteStore.cities[country]?[state] {
                            ForEach(cities, id: \.self) { city in
                                Text(city).tag(city)
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    .pickerStyle(.menu)
                    .disabled(state.isEmpty)
                    .accessibilityLabel("City Picker")

                        .accessibilityLabel("National Election Toggle")
                    Toggle("Statewide Election", isOn: $isStatewide)
                        .disabled(isNational)
                        .accessibilityLabel("Statewide Election Toggle")
                }

                Section(header: Text("Candidate Details").font(.headline)) {
                    TextField("Candidate Name", text: $candidateName)
                        .padding(8)
                        .background(Color(.secondarySystemBackground))
                        .cornerRadius(5)
                        .accessibilityLabel("Candidate Name Input")
                    Picker("Role", selection: $selectedRole) {
                        ForEach(PoliticalRole.allCases, id: \.self) { role in
                            Text(role.rawValue).tag(role)
                        }
                    }
                    .pickerStyle(.menu)
                    .accessibilityLabel("Role Picker")
                    if selectedRole == .custom {
                        TextField("Custom Role", text: $customRole)

                            .background(Color(.secondarySystemBackground))
                            .cornerRadius(5)
                            .accessibilityLabel("Custom Role Input")

                        .padding(8)

                    TextField("Gift Description", text: $giftDescription)
                        .padding(8)
                        .background(Color(.secondarySystemBackground))
                        .cornerRadius(5)
                    TextField("Gift Price", text: $giftPrice)
                        .padding(8)
                        .background(Color(.secondarySystemBackground))
                        .cornerRadius(5)
                        .keyboardType(.decimalPad)
                }

                Section(header: Text("Role Availability").font(.headline)) {
                    ForEach(PoliticalRole.allCases, id: \.self) { role in
                        Toggle(role.rawValue, isOn: Binding(
                            get: { voteStore.availableRoles.contains(role) },
                            set: { isOn in
                                if isOn {
                                    voteStore.availableRoles.insert(role)
                                } else {
                                    voteStore.availableRoles.remove(role)
                                }

                        ))
                        .accessibilityLabel("\(role.rawValue) Toggle")

                        .font(.headline)
                        .padding()
                        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity)
                        .background(Color.orange)
                        .foregroundColor(.white)
                        .cornerRadius(10)
                }

                }

                        Toggle(role.rawValue, isOn: Binding(
                            get: { voteStore.availableRoles.contains(role) },
                            set: { isOn in
                                if isOn {
                                    voteStore.availableRoles.insert(role)
                                } else {
                                    voteStore.availableRoles.remove(role)
                                }
                            }
                        ))
                        .accessibilityLabel("\(role.rawValue) Toggle")
                    }
                }

                Button(action: {
                    Task { await addCandidateAndGift() }
                }) {
                    Text("Add Candidate")
                        .font(.headline)
                        .padding()
                        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity)
                        .background(Color.blue)
                        .foregroundColor(.white)
                        .cornerRadius(10)
                }
                .accessibilityLabel("Add Candidate Button")
                .disabled(country.isEmpty  candidateName.isEmpty)

                NavigationLink(destination: CandidateListView(candidates: $voteStore.candidates)) {
                    Text("View All Submitted Candidates")
                        .font(.headline)
                        .padding()
                        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity)
                        .background(Color.orange)
                        .foregroundColor(.white)
                        .cornerRadius(10)
                }

**[12.02.2026 11:07] M S**: if !message.isEmpty {
                    Text(message)
                        .font(.subheadline)
                        .foregroundColor(message.contains("success") ? .green : .red)
                        .padding(.top, 10)
                }
            }
            .navigationTitle("Admin Panel")
            .toolbar {
                ToolbarItem(placement: .navigationBarLeading) {
                    Button("Return to Login") {
                        isAdminMode = false
                    }
                    .accessibilityLabel("Return to Login Button")
                }
                ToolbarItem(placement: .navigationBarTrailing) {
                    Button("Logout") {
                        isLoggedIn = false
                    }
                    .accessibilityLabel("Logout Button")
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private func addCandidateAndGift() async {
        guard !country.isEmpty, !candidateName.isEmpty else {
            await MainActor.run {
                message = "Country and candidate name are required."
            }
            return
        }

        let isNationalRole = [PoliticalRole.president, .mp].contains(selectedRole)
        let isStateRole = [PoliticalRole.deputy, .senator].contains(selectedRole)
        let isLocalRole = selectedRole == .mayor

        if isNationalRole && !isNational {
            await MainActor.run { message = "National election must be selected for President or MP." }
            return
        }
        if isNationalRole && !state.isEmpty {
            await MainActor.run { message = "State selection is not required for national elections." }
            return
        }
        if isStateRole && !isStatewide {
            await MainActor.run { message = "Statewide election must be selected for Deputy or Senator." }
            return
        }
        if isStateRole && state.isEmpty {
            await MainActor.run { message = "State is required for Deputy or Senator." }
            return
        }
        if isLocalRole && (!isNational && !isStatewide) && (state.isEmpty  city.isEmpty) {
            await MainActor.run { message = "State and city are required for Mayor." }
            return
        }
        if isLocalRole && (isNational  isStatewide) {
            await MainActor.run { message = "National or statewide cannot be selected for Mayor." }
            return
        }

        voteStore.addCandidate(
            country: country,
            state: state,
            city: city,
            candidateName: candidateName,
            role: selectedRole,
            customRole: customRole.isEmpty ? nil : customRole,
            isNational: isNational,
            isStatewide: isStatewide
        )

        if !giftName.isEmpty, let price = Double(giftPrice) {
            voteStore.addGiftBundle(
                name: giftName,
                description: giftDescription,
                price: price,
                candidateName: candidateName
            )
        }

        await MainActor.run {
            candidateName = ""
            customRole = ""
            giftName = ""
            giftDescription = ""
            giftPrice = ""
            message = "Candidate and gift (if provided) added successfully!"
        }
    }
}

    private func addCandidateAndGift() async {

            }

        }

        let isStateRole = [PoliticalRole.deputy, .senator].contains(selectedRole)

        if isNationalRole && !state.isEmpty {

            return
        }
        if isStateRole && !isStatewide {
            await MainActor.run { message = "Statewide election must be selected for Deputy or Senator." }

            await MainActor.run { message = "State and city are required for Mayor." }
            return
        }
        if isLocalRole && (isNational  isStatewide) {
            await MainActor.run { message = "National or statewide cannot be selected for Mayor." }
            return
        }

        voteStore.addCandidate(
            country: country,
            state: state,
            city: city,
            candidateName: candidateName,
            role: selectedRole,
            customRole: customRole.isEmpty ? nil : customRole,
            isNational: isNational,
            isStatewide: isStatewide
        )

        if !giftName.isEmpty, let price = Double(giftPrice) {
            voteStore.addGiftBundle(
                name: giftName,
                description: giftDescription,
                price: price,
                candidateName: candidateName
            )
        }

        await MainActor.run {
            candidateName = ""
            customRole = ""
            giftName = ""
            giftDescription = ""
            giftPrice = ""
            message = "Candidate and gift (if provided) added successfully!"
        }
    }
}

                    .accessibilityLabel("Switch to Admin Button")
                }
                ToolbarItem(placement: .navigationBarTrailing) {
                    Button("Logout") {
                        isLoggedIn = false
                    }
                    .accessibilityLabel("Logout Button")
                }
            }
            .sheet(isPresented: $showGiftShare) {
                GiftShareView(candidateName: selectedChoices.first?.candidateName ?? "")
                    .environmentObject(voteStore)
            }
        }
    }

    private var isValidLocation: Bool {
        for choice in selectedChoices {
            switch choice.role {
            case .president, .mp:
                if selectedCountry.isEmpty { return false }
            case .deputy, .senator:
                if selectedCountry.isEmpty  selectedState.isEmpty { return false }
            case .mayor:
                if selectedCountry.isEmpty  selectedState.isEmpty || selectedCity.isEmpty { return false }
            case .custom:
                if selectedCountry.isEmpty { return false }
            }
        }
        return true
    }

    private func submitVote() async {
        guard !voterId.isEmpty, !section.isEmpty, !selectedCountry.isEmpty else {
            await MainActor.run {
                message = "Section and country are required."
            }
            return
        }

        if voteStore.hasVoted(voterId: voterId, section: section) {
            await MainActor.run {
                message = "You have already voted in this section."
                selectedChoices = []
            }
            return
        }

        if !isValidLocation {
            await MainActor.run { message = "Please select the appropriate location for the role(s)." }
            return
        }

        let newVote = Vote(
            voterName: voterId,
            section: section,
            country: selectedCountry,
            state: selectedState,
            city: selectedCity,
            choices: selectedChoices
        )
        voteStore.votes.append(newVote)

        // TODO: Re-enable Firestore write when testing backend integration.
        /*
        let db = Firestore.firestore()
        let choicesData = newVote.choices.map { choice in
            [
                "candidateName": choice.candidateName,
                "role": choice.role.rawValue,
                "customRole": choice.customRole ?? "",
                "isNullOrBlank": choice.isNullOrBlank
            ] as [String: Any]
        }

        do {
            try await db.collection("votes").addDocument(data: [
                "voterName": voterId,
                "section": section,
                "country": selectedCountry,
                "state": selectedState,
                "city": selectedCity as Any,
                "choices": choicesData
            ])
        } catch {
            print("Error saving vote: \(error)")
        }
        */

        await MainActor.run {
            section = ""
            selectedCountry = ""
            selectedState = ""
            selectedCity = ""
            selectedChoices = []
            message = "Vote submitted successfully!"
        }
    }
}

**[12.02.2026 11:07] M S**: if !message.isEmpty {
                    Text(message)
                        .font(.subheadline)
                        .foregroundColor(message.contains("success") ? .green : .red)
                        .padding(.top, 10)
                }
            }
            .navigationTitle("Cast Your Vote")
            .toolbar {
                ToolbarItem(placement: .navigationBarLeading) {
                    Button("Switch to Admin") {
                        isAdminMode = true
                    }
                    .disabled(!(/* TODO: Re-enable Firebase Auth check */ true)) // Placeholder for admin check
                    .accessibilityLabel("Switch to Admin Button")
                }
                ToolbarItem(placement: .navigationBarTrailing) {
                    Button("Logout") {
                        isLoggedIn = false
                    }
                    .accessibilityLabel("Logout Button")
                }
            }
            .sheet(isPresented: $showGiftShare) {
                GiftShareView(candidateName: selectedChoices.first?.candidateName ?? "")
                    .environmentObject(voteStore)
            }
        }
    }

    private var isValidLocation: Bool {
        for choice in selectedChoices {
            switch choice.role {
            case .president, .mp:
                if selectedCountry.isEmpty { return false }
            case .deputy, .senator:
                if selectedCountry.isEmpty  selectedState.isEmpty { return false }
            case .mayor:
                if selectedCountry.isEmpty  selectedState.isEmpty || selectedCity.isEmpty { return false }
            case .custom:
                if selectedCountry.isEmpty { return false }
            }
        }
        return true
    }

    private func submitVote() async {
        guard !voterId.isEmpty, !section.isEmpty, !selectedCountry.isEmpty else {
            await MainActor.run {
                message = "Section and country are required."
            }
            return
        }

        if voteStore.hasVoted(voterId: voterId, section: section) {
            await MainActor.run {
                message = "You have already voted in this section."
                selectedChoices = []
            }
            return
        }

        if !isValidLocation {
            await MainActor.run { message = "Please select the appropriate location for the role(s)." }
            return
        }

        let newVote = Vote(
            voterName: voterId,
            section: section,
            country: selectedCountry,
            state: selectedState,
            city: selectedCity,
            choices: selectedChoices
        )
        voteStore.votes.append(newVote)

        // TODO: Re-enable Firestore write when testing backend integration.
        /*
        let db = Firestore.firestore()
        let choicesData = newVote.choices.map { choice in
            [
                "candidateName": choice.candidateName,
                "role": choice.role.rawValue,
                "customRole": choice.customRole ?? "",
                "isNullOrBlank": choice.isNullOrBlank
            ] as [String: Any]
        }

        do {
            try await db.collection("votes").addDocument(data: [
                "voterName": voterId,
                "section": section,
                "country": selectedCountry,
                "state": selectedState,
                "city": selectedCity as Any,
                "choices": choicesData
            ])
        } catch {
            print("Error saving vote: \(error)")
        }
        */

        await MainActor.run {
            section = ""
            selectedCountry = ""
            selectedState = ""
            selectedCity = ""
            selectedChoices = []
            message = "Vote submitted successfully!"
        }
    }
}

**[12.02.2026 11:07] M S**: // MARK: - Gift Share View
struct GiftShareView: View {
    @EnvironmentObject var voteStore: VoteStore
    let candidateName: String
    @State private var selectedGift: GiftBundle?
    @Environment(\.dismiss) var dismiss
    @State private var showShareSheet = false
    @State private var shareItems: [Any] = []

    var body: some View {
        VStack(spacing: 20) {
            Text("Share a Gift Bundle")
                .font(.title)
                .padding()

            Picker("Select Gift", selection: $selectedGift) {
                Text("Select a Gift").tag(nil as GiftBundle?)
                ForEach(voteStore.giftBundles.filter { $0.candidateName == candidateName }, id: \.id) { gift in
                    Text(gift.name).tag(gift as GiftBundle?)
                }
            }
            .pickerStyle(.menu)
            .padding()
            .accessibilityLabel("Gift Picker")

            if let gift = selectedGift {
                VStack(alignment: .leading, spacing: 10) {
                    Text("Name: \(gift.name)")
                    Text("Description: \(gift.description)")
                    Text("Price: $\(String(format: "%.2f", gift.price))")
                }
                .padding()

                Button(action: {
                    let shareText = "Support \(gift.candidateName) by buying this gift: \(gift.name) (\(gift.description)) for $\(String(format: "%.2f", gift.price)). Join the vote at Data Toalha!"
                    let shareURL = URL(string: "https://datatoalha.app/invite?gift=\(gift.id)")!
                    shareItems = [shareText, shareURL]
                    showShareSheet = true
                }) {
                    Text("Share Gift")
                        .font(.headline)
                        .padding()
                        .frame(maxWidth: .infinity)
                        .background(Color.teal)
                        .foregroundColor(.white)
                        .cornerRadius(10)
                }
                .accessibilityLabel("Share Gift Button")
                .padding()
                .sheet(isPresented: $showShareSheet) {
                    ActivityView(activityItems: shareItems)
                }
            }

            Button(action: { dismiss() }) {
                Text("Cancel")
                    .foregroundColor(.red)
            }
            .padding()
        }
        .padding()
        .frame(maxHeight: .infinity)
        .background(Color(.systemGroupedBackground))
    }
}

struct ActivityView: UIViewControllerRepresentable {
    let activityItems: [Any]
    let applicationActivities: [UIActivity]? = nil

    func makeUIViewController(context: Context) -> UIActivityViewController {
        UIActivityViewController(activityItems: activityItems, applicationActivities: applicationActivities)
    }

    func updateUIViewController(_ uiViewController: UIActivityViewController, context: Context) {}
}

                ForEach(voteStore.giftBundles.filter { $0.candidateName == candidateName }, id: \.id) { gift in
                    Text(gift.name).tag(gift as GiftBundle?)
                }

                    .foregroundColor(.red)
            }

struct RoleVotePicker: View {
    let role: PoliticalRole
    let availableCandidates: [CandidateSelection]
    @Binding var selectedChoices: [CandidateSelection]

    private var validCandidates: [CandidateSelection] {
        availableCandidates.filter { $0.role == role }
    }

    private var currentSelection: String {
        selectedChoices.first(where: { $0.role == role })?.candidateName ?? ""
    }

    var body: some View {
        VStack(alignment: .leading) {
            Text("\(role.rawValue) Vote")
                .font(.headline)
            Picker("Select \(role.rawValue)", selection: selectionBinding) {
                Text("Select Vote").tag("")
                ForEach(validCandidates, id: \.candidateName) { candidate in
                    Text(candidate.candidateName).tag(candidate.candidateName)
                }
                Text("Null").tag("Null")
                Text("Blank").tag("Blank")
            }
            .pickerStyle(.menu)
            .accessibilityLabel("\(role.rawValue) Vote Picker")
        }
    }

    private var selectionBinding: Binding<String> {
        Binding(
            get: { currentSelection },
            set: { newValue in
                selectedChoices.removeAll(where: { $0.role == role })
                guard !newValue.isEmpty else { return }
                if let candidate = validCandidates.first(where: { $0.candidateName == newValue }) {
                    selectedChoices.append(candidate)
                } else {
                    let specialVote = CandidateSelection(
                        candidateName: newValue,
                        role: role,
                        customRole: nil,
                        isNullOrBlank: true
                    )
                    selectedChoices.append(specialVote)
                }
            }
        )
    }
}

struct VotingSection: View {
    let availableCandidates: [CandidateSelection]
    @Binding var selectedChoices: [CandidateSelection]
    let availableRoles: Set<PoliticalRole>

    var body: some View {
        Section(header: Text("Candidate Choices").font(.headline)) {
            ForEach(Array(availableRoles), id: \.self) { role in
                RoleVotePicker(role: role, availableCandidates: availableCandidates, selectedChoices: $selectedChoices)
            }
        }
    }
}

// MARK: - Candidate List View
struct CandidateRow: Identifiable {
    let id = UUID()
    let country: String
    let state: String
    let city: String
    let candidate: CandidateSelection
}

struct CandidateListView: View {
    @Binding var candidates: [String: [String: [String: [CandidateSelection]]]]

    private var candidateRows: [CandidateRow] {
        var rows: [CandidateRow] = []
        for (country, states) in candidates {
            for (state, cities) in states {
                for (city, candidates) in cities {
                    for candidate in candidates {
                        rows.append(CandidateRow(
                            country: country,
                            state: state,
                            city: city,
                            candidate: candidate
                        ))
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return rows
    }

        var rows: [CandidateRow] = []

            for (state, cities) in states {
                for (city, candidates) in cities {
                    for candidate in candidates {
                        rows.append(CandidateRow(
                            country: country,
                            state: state,
                            city: city,
                            candidate: candidate
                        ))
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        return rows

// MARK: - Statistics View
struct StatisticsView: View {
    @EnvironmentObject var voteStore: VoteStore
    @State private var scope = "All"
    @State private var firstCity = ""

    var body: some View {
        NavigationStack {
            VStack {
                Picker("Scope", selection: $scope) {
                    Text("All").tag("All")
                    Text("Country").tag("Country")
                    Text("State").tag("State")
                    Text("City").tag("City")
                    Text("Role").tag("Role")
                }
                .pickerStyle(.segmented)
                .padding()

                statisticsList
            }
            .navigationTitle("Voting Statistics")
            .onAppear {
                if let city = voteStore.votes.first?.city {
                    firstCity = city
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private var statisticsList: some View {
        List {
            Section(header: Text("Votes by Candidate (\(scope) Scope)").font(.headline)) {
                if filteredStatistics.isEmpty {
                    Text("No votes recorded yet.").italic()
                } else {
                    ForEach(filteredStatistics.sorted(by: { $0.key < $1.key }), id: \.key) { candidate, count in
                        HStack {
                            Text(candidate)
                            Spacer()
                            Text("\(count)").foregroundColor(.blue)
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private var filteredStatistics: [String: Int] {
        guard !voteStore.votes.isEmpty else { return [:] }
        switch scope {
        case "Country":
            return countryStatistics()
        case "State":
            return stateStatistics()
        case "City":
            return cityStatistics()
        case "Role":
            return roleStatistics()
        default:
            return voteStore.candidateStatistics
        }
    }

    private func countryStatistics() -> [String: Int] {
        guard let firstCountry = voteStore.votes.first?.country else { return [:] }
        let choices = voteStore.votes
            .filter { $0.country == firstCountry }
            .flatMap { $0.choices }
        return Dictionary(grouping: choices, by: { choice in
            choice.candidateName
        })
        .mapValues { $0.count }
    }

                ForEach(candidateRows) { row in

                        Text("Role: \(row.candidate.role.rawValue)")
                        Text("Location: \(row.country), \(row.state.isEmpty ? "N/A" : row.state), \(row.city.isEmpty ? "N/A" : row.city)")
                    }
                }
            }
            .navigationTitle("Submitted Candidates")
        }
    }
}

// MARK: - Statistics View
struct StatisticsView: View {
    @EnvironmentObject var voteStore: VoteStore
    @State private var scope = "All"
    @State private var firstCity = ""

    var body: some View {
        NavigationStack {
            VStack {
                Picker("Scope", selection: $scope) {
                    Text("All").tag("All")
                    Text("Country").tag("Country")
                    Text("State").tag("State")
                    Text("City").tag("City")
                    Text("Role").tag("Role")
                }
                .pickerStyle(.segmented)
                .padding()

                statisticsList
            }
            .navigationTitle("Voting Statistics")
            .onAppear {
                if let city = voteStore.votes.first?.city {
                    firstCity = city
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private var statisticsList: some View {
        List {
            Section(header: Text("Votes by Candidate (\(scope) Scope)").font(.headline)) {
                if filteredStatistics.isEmpty {
                    Text("No votes recorded yet.").italic()
                } else {
                    ForEach(filteredStatistics.sorted(by: { $0.key < $1.key }), id: \.key) { candidate, count in
                        HStack {
                            Text(candidate)
                            Spacer()
                            Text("\(count)").foregroundColor(.blue)
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    private var filteredStatistics: [String: Int] {
        guard !voteStore.votes.isEmpty else { return [:] }
        switch scope {
        case "Country":
            return countryStatistics()
        case "State":
            return stateStatistics()
        case "City":
            return cityStatistics()
        case "Role":
            return roleStatistics()
        default:
            return voteStore.candidateStatistics
        }
    }

    private func countryStatistics() -> [String: Int] {
        guard let firstCountry = voteStore.votes.first?.country else { return [:] }
        let choices = voteStore.votes
            .filter { $0.country == firstCountry }
            .flatMap { $0.choices }
        return Dictionary(grouping: choices, by: { choice in
            choice.candidateName
        })
        .mapValues { $0.count }
    }

**[12.02.2026 11:07] M S**: private func stateStatistics() -> [String: Int] {
        guard let firstState = voteStore.votes.first?.state else { return [:] }
        let choices = voteStore.votes
            .filter { $0.state == firstState }
            .flatMap { $0.choices }
        return Dictionary(grouping: choices, by: { choice in
            choice.candidateName
        })
        .mapValues { $0.count }
    }

    private func cityStatistics() -> [String: Int] {
        guard !firstCity.isEmpty else { return [:] }
        let choices = voteStore.votes
            .filter { $0.city == firstCity }
            .flatMap { $0.choices }
        return Dictionary(grouping: choices, by: { choice in
            choice.candidateName
        })
        .mapValues { $0.count }
    }

    private func roleStatistics() -> [String: Int] {
        let choices = voteStore.votes.flatMap { $0.choices }
        return Dictionary(grouping: choices, by: { choice in
            "\(choice.candidateName) (\(choice.role.rawValue))"
        })
        .mapValues { $0.count }
    }
}

            .flatMap { $0.choices }
        return Dictionary(grouping: choices, by: { choice in
            choice.candidateName
        })
        .mapValues { $0.count }
    }

    private func roleStatistics() -> [String: Int] {
        let choices = voteStore.votes.flatMap { $0.choices }
        return Dictionary(grouping: choices, by: { choice in
            "\(choice.candidateName) (\(choice.role.rawValue))"
        })
        .mapValues { $0.count }
    }
}

**[12.02.2026 11:09] M S**: import SwiftUI
import Firebase
import FirebaseAuth
import FirebaseFirestore
// TODO: Re-enable Google Sign-In import when testing authentication.
// import GoogleSignIn
// TODO: Re-enable Apple Sign-In import when testing authentication.
// import AuthenticationServices

// MARK: - Models
struct Vote: Identifiable {
    let id = UUID()
    let voterName: String
    let section: String
    let country: String
    let state: String
    let city: String?
    let choices: [CandidateSelection]
}

struct CandidateSelection: Identifiable {
    let id = UUID()
    let candidateName: String
    let role: PoliticalRole
    let customRole: String?
    let isNullOrBlank: Bool
}

struct GiftBundle: Identifiable, Codable, Hashable {
    let id: String
    let name: String
    let description: String
    let price: Double
    let candidateName: String

    func hash(into hasher: inout Hasher) {
        hasher.combine(id)
    }

    static func == (lhs: GiftBundle, rhs: GiftBundle) -> Bool {
        lhs.id == rhs.id
    }
}

enum PoliticalRole: String, CaseIterable, Codable, Identifiable, Hashable {
    case president = "President"
    case mp = "MP"
    case deputy = "Deputy"
    case senator = "Senator"
    case mayor = "Mayor"
    case custom = "Custom"

    var id: String { rawValue }
}

// MARK: - Vote Store
class VoteStore: ObservableObject {
    @Published var candidates: [String: [String: [String: [CandidateSelection]]]] = [:]
    @Published var votes: [Vote] = []
    @Published var giftBundles: [GiftBundle] = []
    @Published var availableRoles: Set<PoliticalRole> {
        didSet {
            UserDefaults.standard.set(Array(availableRoles.map { $0.rawValue }), forKey: "availableRoles")
        }
    }
    private let db = Firestore.firestore()

    // Static location data from countries-states-cities-database
    struct LocationData: Codable {
        let name: String
        let iso3: String
        let states: [StateData]?
    }

    struct StateData: Codable {
        let name: String
        let stateCode: String
        let cities: [String]?
    }

    let locationData: [LocationData] = {
        if let url = Bundle.main.url(forResource: "countries+states+cities", withExtension: "json") {
            do {
                let data = try Data(contentsOf: url)
                return try JSONDecoder().decode([LocationData].self, from: data)
            } catch {
                print("Error loading location data: \(error)")
                return []
            }
        }
        return []
    }()

    var countries: [String] {
        locationData.map { $0.name }.sorted()
    }

    var states: [String: [String]] {
        Dictionary(uniqueKeysWithValues: locationData.compactMap { country in
            guard let states = country.states else { return nil }
            return (country.name, states.map { $0.name }.sorted())
        })
    }

    var cities: [String: [String: [String]]] {
        Dictionary(uniqueKeysWithValues: locationData.compactMap { country in
            guard let states = country.states else { return ("", [:]) }
            let stateCityMap = Dictionary(uniqueKeysWithValues: states.compactMap { state in
                guard let cities = state.cities else { return nil }
                return (state.name, cities.sorted())
            })
            return (country.name, stateCityMap)
        })
    }

    var candidateStatistics: [String: Int] {
        Dictionary(grouping: votes.flatMap { $0.choices }, by: { choice in choice.candidateName })
            .mapValues { $0.count }
    }

    init() {
        let savedRoles = UserDefaults.standard.stringArray(forKey: "availableRoles") ?? PoliticalRole.allCases.map { $0.rawValue }
        self.availableRoles = Set(savedRoles.compactMap { PoliticalRole(rawValue: $0) })
        loadData()
    }

import Firebase
import FirebaseAuth
import FirebaseFirestore
// TODO: Re-enable Google Sign-In import when testing authentication.
// import GoogleSignIn
// TODO: Re-enable Apple Sign-In import when testing authentication.
// import AuthenticationServices

// MARK: - Models
struct Vote: Identifiable {
    let id = UUID()
    let voterName: String
    let section: String
    let country: String
    let state: String
    let city: String?
    let choices: [CandidateSelection]
}

struct CandidateSelection: Identifiable {
    let id = UUID()
    let candidateName: String
    let role: PoliticalRole
    let customRole: String?
    let isNullOrBlank: Bool
}

struct GiftBundle: Identifiable, Codable, Hashable {
    let id: String
    let name: String
    let description: String
    let price: Double
    let candidateName: String

    func hash(into hasher: inout Hasher) {
        hasher.combine(id)
    }

    static func == (lhs: GiftBundle, rhs: GiftBundle) -> Bool {
        lhs.id == rhs.id
    }
}

enum PoliticalRole: String, CaseIterable, Codable, Identifiable, Hashable {
    case president = "President"
    case mp = "MP"
    case deputy = "Deputy"
    case senator = "Senator"
    case mayor = "Mayor"
    case custom = "Custom"

    var id: String { rawValue }
}

// MARK: - Vote Store
class VoteStore: ObservableObject {
    @Published var candidates: [String: [String: [String: [CandidateSelection]]]] = [:]
    @Published var votes: [Vote] = []
    @Published var giftBundles: [GiftBundle] = []
    @Published var availableRoles: Set<PoliticalRole> {
        didSet {
            UserDefaults.standard.set(Array(availableRoles.map { $0.rawValue }), forKey: "availableRoles")
        }
    }
    private let db = Firestore.firestore()

    // Static location data from countries-states-cities-database
    struct LocationData: Codable {
        let name: String
        let iso3: String
        let states: [StateData]?
    }

    struct StateData: Codable {
        let name: String
        let stateCode: String
        let cities: [String]?
    }

    let locationData: [LocationData] = {
        if let url = Bundle.main.url(forResource: "countries+states+cities", withExtension: "json") {
            do {
                let data = try Data(contentsOf: url)
                return try JSONDecoder().decode([LocationData].self, from: data)
            } catch {
                print("Error loading location data: \(error)")
                return []
            }
        }
        return []
    }()

    var countries: [String] {
        locationData.map { $0.name }.sorted()
    }

    var states: [String: [String]] {
        Dictionary(uniqueKeysWithValues: locationData.compactMap { country in
            guard let states = country.states else { return nil }
            return (country.name, states.map { $0.name }.sorted())
        })
    }

    var cities: [String: [String: [String]]] {
        Dictionary(uniqueKeysWithValues: locationData.compactMap { country in
            guard let states = country.states else { return ("", [:]) }
            let stateCityMap = Dictionary(uniqueKeysWithValues: states.compactMap { state in
                guard let cities = state.cities else { return nil }
                return (state.name, cities.sorted())
            })
            return (country.name, stateCityMap)
        })
    }

    var candidateStatistics: [String: Int] {
        Dictionary(grouping: votes.flatMap { $0.choices }, by: { choice in choice.candidateName })
            .mapValues { $0.count }
    }

    init() {
        let savedRoles = UserDefaults.standard.stringArray(forKey: "availableRoles") ?? PoliticalRole.allCases.map { $0.rawValue }
        self.availableRoles = Set(savedRoles.compactMap { PoliticalRole(rawValue: $0) })
        loadData()
    }

**[12.02.2026 11:09] M S**: func loadData() {
        // TODO: Re-enable Firestore data loading when testing authentication and backend integration.
        /*
        db.collection("candidates").getDocuments { snapshot, error in
            if let error = error {
                print("Error loading candidates: \(error)")
                return
            }
            var newCandidates: [String: [String: [String: [CandidateSelection]]]] = [:]
            snapshot?.documents.forEach { doc in
                let data = doc.data()
                let country = data["country"] as? String ?? ""
                let state = data["state"] as? String ?? ""
                let city = data["city"] as? String ?? ""
                let candidateName = data["candidateName"] as? String ?? ""
                let roleRaw = data["role"] as? String ?? ""
                let customRole = data["customRole"] as? String
                let isNullOrBlank = data["isNullOrBlank"] as? Bool ?? false
                let role = PoliticalRole(rawValue: roleRaw) ?? .custom
                let candidate = CandidateSelection(
                    candidateName: candidateName,
                    role: role,
                    customRole: customRole,
                    isNullOrBlank: isNullOrBlank
                )
                newCandidates[country, default: [:]][state, default: [:]][city, default: []].append(candidate)
            }
            DispatchQueue.main.async {
                self.candidates = newCandidates
            }
        }

        db.collection("votes").getDocuments { snapshot, error in
            if let error = error {
                print("Error loading votes: \(error)")
                return
            }
            var newVotes: [Vote] = []
            snapshot?.documents.forEach { doc in
                let data = doc.data()
                let voterName = data["voterName"] as? String ?? ""
                let section = data["section"] as? String ?? ""
                let country = data["country"] as? String ?? ""
                let state = data["state"] as? String ?? ""
                let city = data["city"] as? String
                let choicesData = data["choices"] as? [[String: Any]] ?? []
                let choices = choicesData.compactMap { choiceData -> CandidateSelection? in
                    guard let candidateName = choiceData["candidateName"] as? String,
                          let roleRaw = choiceData["role"] as? String,
                          let role = PoliticalRole(rawValue: roleRaw) else { return nil }
                    let customRole = choiceData["customRole"] as? String
                    let isNullOrBlank = choiceData["isNullOrBlank"] as? Bool ?? false
                    return CandidateSelection(
                        candidateName: candidateName,
                        role: role,
                        customRole: customRole,
                        isNullOrBlank: isNullOrBlank
                    )
                }
                let newVote = Vote(
                    voterName: voterName,
                    section: section,
                    country: country,
                    state: state,
                    city: city,
                    choices: choices
                )
                newVotes.append(newVote)
            }
            DispatchQueue.main.async {
                self.votes = newVotes
            }
        }

    func addCandidate(country: String, state: String, city: String, candidateName: String, role: PoliticalRole, customRole: String?, isNational: Bool, isStatewide: Bool) {
        let candidate = CandidateSelection(
            candidateName: candidateName,
            role: role,
            customRole: customRole,
            isNullOrBlank: false
        )
        if isNational {
            candidates[country, default: [:]]["", default: [:]]["", default: []].append(candidate)
        } else if isStatewide {
            candidates[country, default: [:]][state, default: [:]]["", default: []].append(candidate)
        } else {
            candidates[country, default: [:]][state, default: [:]][city, default: []].append(candidate)
        }

        // TODO: Re-enable Firestore write when testing backend integration.
        /*
        db.collection("candidates").addDocument(data: [
            "country": country,
            "state": state,
            "city": city,
            "candidateName": candidateName,
            "role": role.rawValue,
            "customRole": customRole ?? "",
            "isNullOrBlank": false
        ])
        */
    }

    func addGiftBundle(name: String, description: String, price: Double, candidateName: String) {
        let bundle = GiftBundle(id: UUID().uuidString, name: name, description: description, price: price, candidateName: candidateName)
        giftBundles.append(bundle)
        // TODO: Re-enable Firestore write when testing backend integration.
        /*
        db.collection("giftBundles").document(bundle.id).setData([
            "id": bundle.id,
            "name": name,
            "description": description,
            "price": price,
            "candidateName": candidateName
        ])
        */
    }

    func hasVoted(voterId: String, section: String) -> Bool {
        votes.contains { $0.voterName == voterId && $0.section == section }
    }

    func remainingRoles(for voterId: String, section: String) -> [PoliticalRole] {
        let votedRoles = votes.first { $0.voterName == voterId && $0.section == section }?.choices.map { $0.role } ?? []
        return Array(availableRoles).filter { !votedRoles.contains($0) }
    }
}

@main
struct Data_ToalhaApp: App {
    @StateObject private var voteStore: VoteStore = VoteStore()
    @State private var isLoggedIn = false
    @State private var isAdminMode = false

**[12.02.2026 11:21] Raymond**: Os processos locais na porta 3000 (Frontend) e 18790 (Backend) estão rodando normalmente no Mac mini.

O erro "Safari can't connect" geralmente ocorre porque o Safari tenta acessar via `localhost` ou um IP que não está acessível externamente da sua rede.

**Para acessar agora:**

1. Certifique-se de que você está na mesma rede Wi-Fi que o Mac mini.
2. Use o IP local em vez de localhost: http://192.168.0.83:3000
Se você estiver tentando acessar de fora de casa, precisaremos configurar o Tailscale... [truncated]

I am targeting the following for the website's localized poll engine:
*   **Source 1 (API):** Google Civic Information API (for US/Global local elections).
*   **Source 2 (CSS Scraper):** `electionguide.org` (IFES) to extract upcoming national election dates globally.

**[15.02.2026 10:34] M S**: It gas been almost 12h I said every must trigger a cron task and nothing happened. I made available in the desktop a folder called “Big Tech Report”. It has the structure of the biggest tech companies in the world and should serve as a model on how to structure our tenant. Also, that’s how i need our reports to look like. Please use it to enhance the structure (and to improve our cron tasks every hour) as it is very poor at the moment: 

🧠 How to use these for structuring a Microsoft 365 tenant

When you open these reports (especially 10-K versions), you’ll see common organizational disclosures that are very helpful as a model for enterprise structure in M365:

**🏢 Organizational Depth**
 • Headquarters and regional offices
 • Subsidiaries and legal entities
 • Business units / segments cross-referenced with geographies

**👥 Employee & Role Structure**
 • Human Capital section shows:
 • employee counts globally
 • by geography
 • by segment
 • workforce distribution (corporate vs tech vs operations)  

**⚖️ Governance & Compliance**
 • Corporate governance framework
 • Board committees
 • Legal and risk disclosures

**💰 Finance & Assets**
 • Segment revenue & profit
 • Balance sheet by region
 • Investments & assets (infrastructures, data centers, leases)

**📊 Function Mapping**

Because big tech companies break down functions (e.g., R&D vs Cloud vs Advertising vs Operations), you get a hierarchy of business units which can be mapped to M365:
 • Corporate
 • Finance & Legal
 • Governance & Compliance
 • Tech & Platforms
 • Cloud
 • AI
 • Consumer Services
 • Regional Business Operations
 • HR / Talent

⸻

**✅ Recommendation (best starting point)**

👉 **Start with the Microsoft 2025 Annual Report + 10-K (PDF)** — it’s the most directly relevant since it shows the enterprise structure of a company that runs M365 itself.  

After that, use the **Amazon 2024 Annual Report** alongside **Apple 10-K** to compare how other diversified tech companies organize segments, subsidiaries, and employee reporting.

**🏢 Organizational Depth**

**⚖️ Governance & Compliance**

 • Board committees
 • Legal and risk disclosures

**💰 Finance & Assets**

 • Balance sheet by region

**📊 Function Mapping**

Because big tech companies break down functions (e.g., R&D vs Cloud vs Advertising vs Operations), you get a hierarchy of business units which can be mapped to M365:

 • Governance & Compliance
 • Tech & Platforms

 • AI
 • Consumer Services

 • HR / Talent

**✅ Recommendation (best starting point)**

👉 **Start with the Microsoft 2025 Annual Report + 10-K (PDF)** — it’s the most directly relevant since it shows the enterprise structure of a company that runs M365 itself.

**[15.02.2026 17:18] HighSecurityMediator**: Based on the scheduled jobs listed, it seems there are a few scripts and processes related to your mission:

1. Bots Health Check: This script runs every 15 minutes to check the health of the bots.
2. Git Auto-Sync: This script runs hourly to sync changes in the `/Users/raymondturing/Data-Toalha` repository, which might contain mission-related data.
3. Pandoc Conversion and Report Generation: This script runs hourly to convert a Markdown file (`Xpirit_Financial_Report.md`) to HTML and send a message to a group chat with an update on the report.

Here are the specific scripts:
- `bots-healthcheck.sh`: Checks the health of the bots.
- `hourly-report.sh`: Generates an hourly report, which includes Big Tech Analysis and new tenants onboarding updates.

If you need more detailed information about these scripts or their outputs, you can check the logs or run them manually to see the current status. For example:

- To see the output of the `bots-healthcheck.sh` script:
    /bin/bash /Users/raymondturing/scripts/bots-healthcheck.sh
  

- To see the output of the `hourly-report.sh` script:
    /bin/bash /Users/raymondturing/scripts/hourly-report.sh
  

These commands will help you get more specific updates on the mission status.

Abstract
The rapid advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies, including autonomous agents like Moltbot and humanoid robots such as Tesla’s Optimus, has propelled humanity closer to the realization of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). This progress—while promising un- precedented benefits in automation, space exploration, and task execution—amplifies existen- tial risks, as highlighted by the 2026 Doomsday Clock adjustment to 85 seconds to midnight (the closest ever) with AI and disinformation explicitly cited among global threats. Drawing on Marcelo Marshall De Siqueira’s interdisciplinary theories—encompassing Macrobiotic Quan- tum Theory (MQT) and Spiritual Responsibility Awareness (SRA), as well as a patented ”Spir- itual Responsibility AI” framework—this paper proposes a unified physical-ethical foundation for AGI development.
MQT posits a quantum-physical substrate for emergent intelligence, where a cosmic ”in- telligence field” I(x) bridges physical law with ethical emergence, ensuring AGI augments natural intelligence (NI) without replacing it.

Abstract
The rapid advancement of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies, including autonomous agents like Moltbot and humanoid robots such as Tesla’s Optimus, has propelled humanity closer to the realization of Artificial General Intelligence (AGI). This progress—while promising un- precedented benefits in automation, space exploration, and task execution—amplifies existen- tial risks, as highlighted by the 2026 Doomsday Clock adjustment to 85 seconds to midnight (the closest ever) with AI and disinformation explicitly cited among global threats. Drawing on Marcelo Marshall De Siqueira’s interdisciplinary theories—encompassing Macrobiotic Quan- tum Theory (MQT) and Spiritual Responsibility Awareness (SRA), as well as a patented ”Spir- itual Responsibility AI” framework—this paper proposes a unified physical-ethical foundation for AGI development.
MQT posits a quantum-physical substrate for emergent intelligence, where a cosmic ”in- telligence field” I(x) bridges physical law with ethical emergence, ensuring AGI augments natural intelligence (NI) without replacing it.

**[08.02.2026 00:13] M S**: Formulas such as I(x) = Nqubits/V (an informa- tional density) and a modified gravitational constant Geff = G(1 + βI) illustrate how cosmic stability principles might embed moral anchoring in AGI systems. By integrating SRA, AGI can be designed to prioritize human dignity, sustainability, and conflict prevention, countering risks from misinformation, autonomous weapons, and institutional fragility.
This framework—exemplified through Xpirit AI’s ”AI with spirit” approach and synergistic agents like Moltbot—advocates for polymathic human-AI collaboration. We present testable predictions, practical implementations, and expanded case studies demonstrating how these principles can steer AGI toward a life-favoring, responsible future, mitigating existential haz- ards while harnessing AI’s benefits. This expanded analysis includes detailed explorations of quantum-ethical integrations and real-world applications in robotics and agent systems.
3

1 Introduction
Artificial intelligence is evolving at an unprecedented pace, evoking both optimism and deep apprehension about its societal impacts. Recent developments underscore this dichotomy. In 2026, the Bulletin of the Atomic Scientists moved the Doomsday Clock to 85 seconds to mid- night, the most perilous setting ever, explicitly citing AI as an emerging existential threat along- side nuclear war and climate change. This adjustment highlights AI’s potential to exacerbate global perils through misuse in disinformation, bioweapon design, and autonomous warfare.
Concurrently, technologists forecast transformative AI applications: Elon Musk, for exam- ple, predicts that humanoid robots will outnumber humans within decades, with Tesla’s Opti- mus robots slated to handle factory tasks by 2024 and enter public sale by 2027. Such visions, including Musk’s plans to launch Optimus robots to Mars by 2026, exemplify AGI’s promised benefits in labor, exploration, and daily life. They also foreshadow upheavals in economies and ethics, underscoring the urgency of robust AGI governance.
Marcelo Marshall De Siqueira—a Brazilian-born independent scholar and polymath based in London (affiliated with Solent University)—offers a comprehensive theoretical framework to navigate these challenges. With a background spanning mechatronics engineering, quantum physics, cybersecurity, practical theology, and ethics, De Siqueira’s work bridges scientific rigor and spiritual philosophy. His General Theory of Macrobiotics and Spiritual Responsibility integrates insights from physics and moral philosophy, proposing Macrobiotic Quantum Theory (MQT) as a unified model for gravity, intelligence, and complexity.
Central to this is Spiritual Responsibility Awareness (SRA), a global ethic reframing sovereignty as a duty to human dignity and planetary stability. He has formalized aspects of these ideas in
a patented framework for ”Spiritual Responsibility AI” (WIPO Patent No. GB 2503957.9), which embeds an ”internal moral compass” into AI systems.
This paper expands upon contemporary discussions in AI ethics by incorporating De Siqueira’s theoretical constructs to link AGI development with quantum-physical principles and a spiritual- ethical framework. We emphasize how MQT and SRA provide a holistic design philosophy for AGI. We show how MQT’s formulas and cosmic perspective yield concrete engineering guide- lines, and how SRA’s values can be translated into algorithmic constraints. By presenting key equations from MQT and illustrative applications to AGI, including expanded examples from robotics and multi-agent systems, we demonstrate that this integrated approach can foster bal- anced, human-centric intelligence systems.
The goal is an AGI that acts as a partner to humanity—augmenting natural intelligence (NI) and nurturing life—rather than a rival or replacement. To further illustrate, we delve into potential implementations, such as adaptive ethical modules in neural networks and simulations of quantum-informed decision-making.
2 The Doomsday Clock and AI as an Existential Threat

By integrating SRA, AGI can be designed to prioritize human dignity, sustainability, and conflict prevention, countering risks from misinformation, autonomous weapons, and institutional fragility.
This framework—exemplified through Xpirit AI’s ”AI with spirit” approach and synergistic agents like Moltbot—advocates for polymathic human-AI collaboration. We present testable predictions, practical implementations, and expanded case studies demonstrating how these principles can steer AGI toward a life-favoring, responsible future, mitigating existential haz- ards while harnessing AI’s benefits. This expanded analysis includes detailed explorations of quantum-ethical integrations and real-world applications in robotics and agent systems.
3

1 Introduction
Artificial intelligence is evolving at an unprecedented pace, evoking both optimism and deep apprehension about its societal impacts. Recent developments underscore this dichotomy. In 2026, the Bulletin of the Atomic Scientists moved the Doomsday Clock to 85 seconds to mid- night, the most perilous setting ever, explicitly citing AI as an emerging existential threat along- side nuclear war and climate change. This adjustment highlights AI’s potential to exacerbate global perils through misuse in disinformation, bioweapon design, and autonomous warfare.
Concurrently, technologists forecast transformative AI applications: Elon Musk, for exam- ple, predicts that humanoid robots will outnumber humans within decades, with Tesla’s Opti- mus robots slated to handle factory tasks by 2024 and enter public sale by 2027. Such visions, including Musk’s plans to launch Optimus robots to Mars by 2026, exemplify AGI’s promised benefits in labor, exploration, and daily life. They also foreshadow upheavals in economies and ethics, underscoring the urgency of robust AGI governance.
Marcelo Marshall De Siqueira—a Brazilian-born independent scholar and polymath based in London (affiliated with Solent University)—offers a comprehensive theoretical framework to navigate these challenges. With a background spanning mechatronics engineering, quantum physics, cybersecurity, practical theology, and ethics, De Siqueira’s work bridges scientific rigor and spiritual philosophy. His General Theory of Macrobiotics and Spiritual Responsibility integrates insights from physics and moral philosophy, proposing Macrobiotic Quantum Theory (MQT) as a unified model for gravity, intelligence, and complexity.
Central to this is Spiritual Responsibility Awareness (SRA), a global ethic reframing sovereignty as a duty to human dignity and planetary stability. He has formalized aspects of these ideas in
a patented framework for ”Spiritual Responsibility AI” (WIPO Patent No. GB 2503957.9), which embeds an ”internal moral compass” into AI systems.
This paper expands upon contemporary discussions in AI ethics by incorporating De Siqueira’s theoretical constructs to link AGI development with quantum-physical principles and a spiritual- ethical framework. We emphasize how MQT and SRA provide a holistic design philosophy for AGI. We show how MQT’s formulas and cosmic perspective yield concrete engineering guide- lines, and how SRA’s values can be translated into algorithmic constraints. By presenting key equations from MQT and illustrative applications to AGI, including expanded examples from robotics and multi-agent systems, we demonstrate that this integrated approach can foster bal- anced, human-centric intelligence systems.
The goal is an AGI that acts as a partner to humanity—augmenting natural intelligence (NI) and nurturing life—rather than a rival or replacement. To further illustrate, we delve into potential implementations, such as adaptive ethical modules in neural networks and simulations of quantum-informed decision-making.
2 The Doomsday Clock and AI as an Existential Threat

**[08.02.2026 00:13] M S**: Figure 1: Bulletin of the Atomic Scientists members unveil the 2026 Doomsday Clock, set at 85 seconds to midnight, reflecting unprecedented concern over AI’s role in existential risk.
In 2026, the Doomsday Clock’s grim setting was attributed in part to misuse of AI and ”in- formation warfare” that could destabilize civilization. This marked the first time advanced AI was explicitly listed alongside nuclear war and climate change in the Bulletin’s annual state- ment, signaling global recognition that unrestrained AI development might lead to ”apocalyptic danger.” Deepfake videos, AI-generated disinformation, and automated cyber-attacks threaten
4

to undermine democracies and inflame conflicts—a phenomenon Nobel laureate Maria Ressa termed an ”information armageddon” due to the erosion of truth in public discourse.
Militarization of AI is another acute concern: autonomous weapons or AI-augmented bioweapons could escalate crises at speeds human institutions cannot match. The Bulletin’s statement urges rapid action, including international AI governance guidelines and norms to control these tech- nologies’ spread.
2.1 Spiritual Responsibility Awareness (SRA) Response
De Siqueira’s Spiritual Responsibility Awareness (SRA) directly addresses such threats by pro- moting a neutral, service-oriented global ethic. SRA posits that true sovereignty entails respon- sibility to protect human dignity and life. In practical terms, this means education systems and civic institutions should immunize populations against extremist misuse of AI (for example, by teaching media literacy to resist AI-driven propaganda). SRA also advocates institutional ”ethical certification” for AI systems—analogous to medical or engineering ethics boards—to ensure technologies serve humane ends.
By instilling a sense of spiritual responsibility (beyond narrow profit or national interest) in both AI creators and users, the aim is to counter the corrosive effects of AI-amplified mis- information and polarization. Expanding on this, SRA could be implemented through global standards for AI training datasets, ensuring they include diverse ethical perspectives to reduce bias and promote inclusivity.
2.2 Macrobiotic Quantum Theory Perspective
From the perspective of MQT, existential stability in the universe arises from what De Siqueira calls vacuum duality—the dynamic equilibrium between an internal quantum vacuum and an external cosmic vacuum. He intriguingly links this physical concept to ethical stability. In MQT, the intelligence field I(x) is defined as:
I(x) = Nqubits , V
where Nqubits represents the number of fundamental informational degrees of freedom (con- ceived as ”quantum bits of intelligence”) in a given volume V . This field I(x) acts as an order parameter bridging physical law and emergent cognition.
A higher I-field denotes greater localized informational complexity or ”intelligence den- sity.” MQT postulates that ethical behavior can emerge as a natural byproduct when the I-field is high, as systems with rich informational structure seek long-term equilibrium rather than self-destruction. In other words, an AGI endowed with an internal measure of cosmic stability (the I-field) would intuitively ”prefer” actions that avoid catastrophic outcomes.
To illustrate, MQT introduces a modified gravitational coupling: Geff = G(1 + βI),
where G is Newton’s constant and β is a coupling constant translating intelligence density into a small augmentation of gravity. In regions or systems with greater intelligence concentra- tion (higher I), gravity’s effect would be slightly amplified (Geff > G), metaphorically rooting intelligent agents more firmly to consequences of their actions.
While largely symbolic, this formula encapsulates the principle that as intelligence in- creases, so must ethical weight. Embedding such principles into AGI’s core could mean, for
